name: Bill Christie
subject: playoff time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Christie for President, Inc
body:
Peter,
I have always been a Cardinals fan, my son Todd a Cardinals fan, but Chris? Well, he's a Mets fan as evidenced by the photo below that I dug up from my album.

This morning, Chris said he thinks the Cardinals will beat the Cubs. At least we agree on that! We got to talking and wondered which playoff team was the most popular among his supporters.
Will you chip in below to help us determine which playoff team is the most popular among the campaign's supporters?
**[<<< Donate $5 or more to the campaign here for the St. Louis Cardinals >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44386302:6z5M7CLNS:m:1:1516426255:B204626E7E3A446A96571A8DCFFFEC86:r)**

**[<<< Donate $5 or more to the campaign here for the Los Angeles Dodgers >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44386307:6z5M7CLNS:m:1:1516426255:B204626E7E3A446A96571A8DCFFFEC86:r)**
**[<<< Donate $5 or more to the campaign here for the New York Mets >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44386308:6z5M7CLNS:m:1:1516426255:B204626E7E3A446A96571A8DCFFFEC86:r)**
**[<<< Donate $5 or more to the campaign here for the Texas Rangers >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44386309:6z5M7CLNS:m:1:1516426255:B204626E7E3A446A96571A8DCFFFEC86:r)**

If your favorite team didn't make the playoffs, don't feel left out! **[You can donate $5 or more here to help the campaign](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44386312:6z5M7CLNS:m:1:1516426255:B204626E7E3A446A96571A8DCFFFEC86:r)** and make a note of your favorite team.
If you contribute today, you will be on our list to receive an email tomorrow on which team got the most support!
Bill Christie

name: Katie McGinty
subject: We can't wait
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate |
body:
Friend --

Nearly every day, we have another tragedy to mourn. With the latest shooting in Oregon, it's become clearer than ever that we can’t keep waiting to act on gun violence.

After the horrific shooting in Newtown, Pat Toomey took a stand for gun safety. He put partisanship aside and introduced a bill to improve background checks. But now as he’s facing re-election and pressure from the NRA, he won’t commit to reintroducing his bill.

That’s unacceptable. I’ve called on Pat Toomey to stand up for Pennsylvania families and support commonsense gun safety legislation. Will you join with me right now and add your name as well?

https://act.myngp.com/Forms/4403677110149840896?ms=101215

Pat Toomey wants you to think he’s a moderate. He wants you to believe that he puts the interests of Pennsylvania first. But make no mistake, he’s not a moderate.

The truth is that 95% of Pennsylvanians support universal background checks for firearm purchases. If you’re wondering why Toomey can’t commit to such a popular position — look no further than the $1.3 million the National Rifle Association spent in 2010 to help elect him.

It’s time to hold Pat Toomey accountable and demand he commit to supporting commonsense gun safety legislation. Add your name today.

https://act.myngp.com/Forms/4403677110149840896?ms=101215

Pennsylvania and America has waited long enough to take action on gun violence. We can’t keep mourning tragedy after tragedy without taking a stand.

Thanks,

Katie

----------------------------------------------
| Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate |
----------------------------------------------

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please https://act.myngp.com/el/-1205520938288807936/-1502492534960553984.

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: Official Bernie 2016
subject: [RSVP Deadline] Attend a Debate Watch Party Tuesday night
body:
#
[**Tuesday night, Bernie supporters are holding amazing parties in homes, pubs and theaters all around you to watch the first Democratic debate. Don 't miss out! Click here to see the events near you.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb25a0/43f17890/5450ecae/621fad32/90582638/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyMDkwMiJ9/ "http://map.berniesanders.com/#zipcode=20902&distance=50&eventtype=D&daterange=all-events")
Bernie Supporter -
[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb25a0/43f17890/5450ecae/621fad32/90582638/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyMDkwMiJ9/ "http://map.berniesanders.com/#zipcode=20902&distance=50&eventtype=D&daterange=all-events")On Tuesday night all of America will finally get the chance to hear Bernie's message directly in the first Democratic presidential debate. And it's amazing: supporters have planned 3,470 Debate Watch Parties across the country -- about half in large public venues to make room for our whole movement.
[**Don 't miss this historic event! Celebrate with other Bernie supporters while all of America finally hears Bernie speak out about the issues establishment politicians ignore.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb25a0/43f17890/5450ecae/621fad32/90582638/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyMDkwMiJ9/ "http://map.berniesanders.com/#zipcode=20902&distance=50&eventtype=D&daterange=all-events")
Here's the closest event to you, but there are lots more near you including events at pubs, theaters and other public locations (in most places in the country):
**What:** First Democratic Party Debate Watch in Silver Spring
**Where:** Alex and Lisa's
600 Woodside Pky
Silver Spring, MD 20910
**When:** Tuesday, October 13th
8:00 pm EDT
[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/4v848)
Can't make this event? [**Check out other Debate Watch Parties happening near you.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb25a0/43f17890/5450ecae/621fad33/90582638/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyMDkwMiJ9/ "http://map.berniesanders.com/#zipcode=20902&distance=50&eventtype=D&daterange=all-event")
**Please note that CNN moved the start time of the debate back to 8:30 ET / 5:30 PT.**
[**If you can't make it, please chip in $3 to help fund the organizing work that makes these parties possible -- we appreciate any way you can help.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb25a0/43f17890/5450ecae/621fad30/90582638/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/event-contribute?refcode=em151012attend")
See you at the Debate Watch Parties tomorrow,
Team Bernie
PS: [**If you plan on watching the debate at home with a few family and friends, please add another debate watch party to our map.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb25a0/43f17890/5450ecae/621fad31/90582638/VEsA/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/create") You can keep it private, or make it public and meet a few new Bernie supporters in your neighborhood.

****[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb25a0/43f17890/5450ecae/621fad3e/90582638/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=em151012attend-dwp")****

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb25a0/43f17890/5450ecae/621fad3f/90582638/VEsO/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb25a0/43f17890/5450ecae/621fad3c/90582638/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb25a0/43f17890/5450ecae/621fad3d/90582638/VEsHBQ/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb25a0/43f17890/5450ecae/621fad3a/90582638/VEsHBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

subject: "The Cruz moment is coming"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cruz for President
body:

---

| Dear Friend,

I had to share this with you.

Yesterday on a panel discussion on Meet the Press, Chuck Todd [declared](http://em.tedcruz.org/wf/click?upn=oxRiKmNZf-2B-2FjHRySYBDLyx-2FfYGqyCM1A1cRZnLoHNvDJkn5xgECLOVpVCnZhpFvNyiYPbWyq8n7VZ7lxxelZjg-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCHEHzr3OkHqgGrm8EhO8BD2crf8zCuoHEzceqRX-2FmEtzXR6DcG0mxNJbVzfFCHsZeQnkm4HJFh8wlEaX7x5XHjVP5NtsIJ-2FIHv7CR7-2Bcqvf9kDe0RT9JQTO7M1zhFyAHqDza3m21O43DcOH-2BQD4O2FX5W3sQq3ZHbbkzj-2BRwTk1ZQBKL3WiE-2Fgkd9bDR-2BkPsbOQ3IinhEqfSKOvmIpJhv7M1anyn-2FJquvNe9sDvKATd0Rk7d0S-2FsoAL0s1wZ5TmdpRakzbFBXJKSbRvPTNWi-2FlITkrAq2iE8nuGiwwIOBzt8uKVlOUqlEqRx-2Bdp6NS1HDFykqZ3FvyBZhGI64GyD5bMRwbX4M-2Fsyw3ow-2F3QL4FQCVS2diGrOVBmtOTdtwChQfE-3D) "the Cruz moment is coming." You won't want to miss what else was said... For liberty,

Mark Campbell
National Political Director
Cruz for President
